bird.name: Timneh parrot
bird.summary: The Timneh parrot (Psittacus timneh), also known as the Timneh grey parrot or Timneh African grey parrot, is a West African parrot. Formerl…

locations.name: 旱季
locations.summary: 旱季，或稱乾季，指在降水量有顯著差別的地區，其一年中降水相对较少的月份。 请注意，在某些地區的某些年份，在“旱季”里每隔一两天下一场不大也不小的雨。所以“旱”是相对于“雨季”里每天下雨甚至连续数日不断地下雨而言的。

relations.subject: Timneh parrot
relations.evidence: Though they are sometimes found in cultivated areas and gardens, it is not clear whether these habitats contain self-sustaining populations; the birds may make seasonal movements out of the driest parts of their range in the dry season
